query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS employer_tax_forms (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  positionHolderId INT NOT NULL,
  businessEntityId INT NOT NULL,
  houseId INT NOT NULL,
  taxYear INT NOT NULL,
  documentType ENUM('w2', '1099_nec', '1099_misc', 'k1_1065', 'k1_1120s') NOT NULL,
  recipientName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  recipientSSN VARCHAR(11),
  recipientAddress TEXT,
  payerName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  payerEIN VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  payerAddress TEXT,
  wagesBox1 DECIMAL(12,2),
  federalWithheldBox2 DECIMAL(12,2),
  socialSecurityWagesBox3 DECIMAL(12,2),
  socialSecurityWithheldBox4 DECIMAL(12,2),
  medicareWagesBox5 DECIMAL(12,2),
  medicareWithheldBox6 DECIMAL(12,2),
  stateWagesBox16 DECIMAL(12,2),
  stateWithheldBox17 DECIMAL(12,2),
  stateCode VARCHAR(2),
  nonemployeeCompensation DECIMAL(12,2),
  ordinaryIncome DECIMAL(12,2),
  guaranteedPayments DECIMAL(12,2),
  capitalGains DECIMAL(12,2),
  distributionsReceived DECIMAL(12,2),
  vaultDocumentId INT,
  s3Url VARCHAR(500),
  filedWithIRS BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  filedAt TIMESTAMP,
  irsConfirmationNumber VARCHAR(50),
  deliveredToRecipient BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  deliveredAt TIMESTAMP,
  deliveryMethod ENUM('mail', 'email', 'portal'),
  status ENUM('draft', 'generated', 'filed', 'corrected', 'voided') DEFAULT 'draft',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
